data planning

Climate Central

Climate Central

Comprehensive climate risk assessment and visualization tool for local communities

Cost: Free
Skill: Beginner

green data

i-Tree Tools

USDA Forest Service

Suite of tools to quantify forest ecosystem services and environmental benefits

Cost: Free
Skill: Intermediate

National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration

Interactive viewer showing potential impacts of sea level rise on coastal communities

Cost: Free

Cost: Free
Skill: Beginner

Real-World Impact

Learn how cities worldwide are adapting to climate change

Norfolk, Virginia - Coastal Resilience & Adaptation

Norfolk, United States • 2023

How Norfolk is adapting to sea level rise through comprehensive resilience planning and nature-based solutions

sea level rise flooding storm surge
Read Case Study

Minneapolis, Minnesota - Green Infrastructure & Equity

Minneapolis, United States • 2022

Integrating green infrastructure with community equity in underserved neighborhoods

urban heat stormwater flooding environmental justice
Read Case Study

Phoenix, Arizona - Urban Heat Island Mitigation

Phoenix, United States • 2023

Largest US city tackling extreme heat through cool roofs, urban forestry, and public health measures

extreme heat energy demand public health
Read Case Study

Rotterdam, Netherlands - Water Resilience & Climate Adaptation

Rotterdam, Netherlands • 2022

Europe's leader in climate adaptation through innovative water management and circular economy approaches

flooding water scarcity climate adaptation
Read Case Study

Paris, France - Urban Forestry & Green Spaces

Paris, France • 2023

Planting 170,000 trees to combat urban heat, improve air quality, and enhance biodiversity

urban heat air pollution biodiversity loss
Read Case Study

Singapore - Sustainable City & Climate Resilience

Singapore, Singapore • 2023

Island nation building comprehensive climate adaptation through green buildings and water management

sea level rise heat water security
Read Case Study

Bogotá, Colombia - Climate Action & Social Inclusion

Bogotá, Colombia • 2022

Latin American city integrating climate adaptation with poverty reduction and social equity

water scarcity air pollution climate vulnerability
Read Case Study

Copenhagen, Denmark - Cycling & Carbon Neutral Strategy

Copenhagen, Denmark • 2023

World leader in sustainable transport and carbon neutrality through cycling infrastructure and renewable energy

carbon emissions transportation energy
